tables.description: This subject phenotypes data table includes data on malignant and benign tumors for registry participants and relatives.

variables.name: AGEDX
variables.description: Age at diagnosis. Coding for this field is based on SEER, NAACCR and ACoS guidelines.

variables.name: BEHAV
variables.description: ICD-O-3 5th digit behavior code. Coding for this field is based on SEER, NAACCR and AcoS guidelines.

variables.name: DXSRC
variables.description: Source of diagnosis information (site, histology, behavior, laterality).

variables.name: HISTO
variables.description: First four digits of the ICD-O-3 morphology code which designates the histologic type of this tumor. Coding for this field is based on SEER, NAACCR and AcoS guidelines.

variables.name: LATERAL
variables.description: Laterality of tumor. Side of the body in which the tumor originated. Note: laterality of left and right is not applicable for all sites. Coding for this field is based on SEER, NAACCR and AcoS guidelines.

variables.name: METS
variables.description: Is this a metastatic tumor (recurrence)? Required if from a follow up study (2007 or 2012)

variables.name: METS_TUMOR_NO
variables.description: TUMOR_NUM of the original tumor of which this tumor is a metastasis. Required if METS=1.

variables.name: QUALIFY_TUMOR
variables.description: Flag indicating that the tumor qualifies the participant for eligibility.  The qualifying tumor is the tumor on the basis of which the proband was ascertained, as determined by the recruiting Center.

variables.name: SITE
variables.description: Location where this tumor originated in as much detail as is known and for which a code is provided in ICD-O-3.

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: External BCFR ID

variables.name: TUMOR_NO
variables.description: Computer generated sequential number, starting with '1', assigned to each tumor for a given individual when entered into local system. No adjustment is made when a tumor is deleted from the system. Tumor numbers are never reused. Tumor_no is a machine-generated integer.

variables.name: PTBR
variables.description: Person Time or Survival Time  for breast cancer. Time (in years) to recurrence or mortality in affected women, time to diagnosis or mortality in unaffected women. For unaffected at baseline: years from baseline until the earliest of: breast cancer  diagnosis, bilateral mastectomy, deceased, last follow-up. As to the last follow-up, it's the latest date of: the reported livedate, the date when the participant personally completed the FU/ProFSC/PAR epi questionnaire for affected at baseline:years from first breast cancer diagnosis until the next earliest of: breast cancer diagnosis, bilateral mastectomy , deceased, last follow-up. As to the last follow-up, it's the latest date of: the reported livedate, the date when the participant personally completed the FU/ProFSC/PAR epi questionnaire.

variables.name: PTOV
variables.description: Person Time or Survival Time for ovarian cancer.  Time (in years) to recurrence or mortality in affected women, time to diagnosis or mortality in unaffected women. For unaffected at baseline:years from baseline until the earliest of: ovarian cancer  diagnosis, bilateral oophorectomy, deceased, last follow-up. As to the last follow-up, it's the latest date of: the reported livedate, the date when the participant personally completed the FU/ProFSC/PAR epi questionnaire for affected  at baseline:years from first ovarian cancer  diagnosis until the next earliest of: ovarian cancer  diagnosis, bilateral oophorectomy, deceased, last follow-up. As to the last follow-up, it's the latest date of: the reported livedate, the date when the participant personally completed the FU/ProFSC/PAR epi questionnaire.
